getSpotPrice(address,address).details: Example: If Collateral = ETH, Underlying = USDC, returns price of 1 ETH in USDC (e.g., 3000 * 1e6).Decimals must be standardized (ensure caller knows if it is WAD or token decimals).       Recommendation: Always return WAD (18 decimals).

getSpotPrice(address,address).notice: Returns the price of the Collateral Token denominated in the Underlying Token.
